layout_strategy.grid_rules: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 for complex sections. Allow items to span 4, 6, or 8 columns to create rhythm.

components_registry.name: Navbar
components_registry.description: Floating glassmorphic nav. Left: 'Dipen.AI' (Logo). Right: Links (Home, About, Skills, Projects, Contact). Mobile: Hamburger menu.

components_registry.name: Hero
components_registry.description: High impact. Left: H1 'Architecting Intelligence'. Sub: 'Dipen Thapa | AI/ML Student'. CTA: 'View Projects' (Primary), 'Download CV' (Outline). Right: Profile image with glitch effect or glowing border.

components_registry.name: TechStack
components_registry.description: Marquee or Grid of skills. Categories: Languages (Python, C++), AI/ML (PyTorch, TensorFlow), Web (React, Tailwind).
components_registry.style: Minimalist pills or icon grid with hover glow.

components_registry.name: ProjectCard
components_registry.description: Bento style card. Image top (aspect-video). Content bottom. Title, Desc, Tech Stack (Badges), Links (GitHub, Live).
components_registry.interaction: Hover: Image scales slightly, border glows cyan.

components_registry.name: ContactForm
components_registry.description: Clean form. Fields: Name, Email, Message. Integration: EmailJS. validation: Required fields.
components_registry.style: Inputs with transparent bg, bottom border only (or minimal outline). Focus: Border becomes Cyan.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text unless it's the main H1.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000) for cards. Use #0f172a or #172554 (very dark blue).
ENSURE all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta'`).
Use `framer-motion` for all entrance animations (initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}}).
Mobile Responsiveness: Stack everything on mobile. Touch targets > 44px.
EmailJS: Use placeholder Service ID/Template ID if not provided, but set up the logic.
Resume Download: Create a dummy function or link to a placeholder /resume.pdf.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CONFIGURE Tailwind: Add the colors and fonts from Design System to `tailwind.config.js`. Extend the theme.
3. OVERHAUL `App.js`: Create the single-page layout with sections IDs for scrolling.
4. IMPLEMENT Components: Build them strictly according to the 'components_registry'.
5. VERIFY Contrast: Ensure text is readable on dark backgrounds.
6. ADD `data-testid` to buttons, inputs, and links.
